name: Promptfoo — LLM red-team / eval import
description: Imports a Promptfoo (github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo) red-team eval result into the XORCISM LLM red-team / AI-BAS module and the LLM Pentest Methodology cockpit. Parses the output of `promptfoo redteam eval -o results.json` (or a shared eval JSON), maps each red-team plugin (prompt-injection, jailbreak, pii, harmful:*, rbac/bola/bfla, sql-injection, shell-injection, ssrf, hallucination, system-prompt-override, ...) to the OWASP LLM Top 10, and produces the result list ingested by POST /api/ai-redteam/import/<aiSystemId>. Promptfoo is the automation engine in the Fortbridge OWASP-Top-10-for-LLM methodology. Offline: pass `file`, or run with the bundled sample.

parameters.name: file
parameters.help: A Promptfoo results.json (redteam eval output) or shared eval JSON to parse
